creator: ohartmann@walstatt.org
text:
Upgrade of port fails on recent CURRENT (FreeBSD 13.0-CURRENT #174 r368666: Tue Dec 15 18:04:30 CET 2020  amd64) due to the error shown below:

[...]
====> Compressing man pages (compress-man)
===>>> Starting check for runtime dependencies
===>>> Gathering dependency list for math/nlopt from ports
===>>> Dependency check complete for math/nlopt

===>>> All >> pagmo2-2.15.0.102 >> math/nlopt (3/5)

===>  Installing for nlopt-2.7.0
===>   Registering installation for nlopt-2.7.0 as automatic
pkg-static: Unable to access file /usr/ports/math/nlopt/work/stage/usr/local/lib/python3.7/site-packages/_nlopt.so:No such file or directory
pkg-static: Unable to access file /usr/ports/math/nlopt/work/stage/usr/local/lib/python3.7/site-packages/nlopt.py:No such file or directory
*** Error code 74
